sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check current state
nodes = current_frame.segmentation['nodes']
white_diamond = [n for n in nodes if n['color'] == 'W' and n['pixels'] == 12]
gray_diamonds = [n for n in nodes if n['color'] == 'G' and n['pixels'] == 12]
orange_square = [n for n in nodes if n['color'] == 'O' and n['pixels'] == 20]
purple_diamond = [n for n in nodes if n['color'] == 'p' and n['pixels'] == 20]

print(f"White diamond: {[n['boundary'][0] for n in white_diamond]}")
print(f"Gray diamonds: {[n['boundary'][0] for n in gray_diamonds]}")
print(f"Orange square: {[n['boundary'][0] for n in orange_square]}")
print(f"Purple diamond: {[n['boundary'][0] for n in purple_diamond]}")
print(f"Last action result: {last_action_result.get('gameplay_changed')}, {last_action_result.get('level_completed')}")

# Check animation
if hasattr(last_animation, '__len__') and len(last_animation) > 0:
    anim = last_animation[0]
    print(f"\nAnimation frames: {len(anim.frames)}")
    for i, f in enumerate(anim.frames):
        wn = [n for n in f.segmentation['nodes'] if n['color'] == 'W' and n['pixels'] == 12]
        gn = [n for n in f.segmentation['nodes'] if n['color'] == 'G' and n['pixels'] == 12]
        print(f"  Frame {i}: W={wn[0]['boundary'][0] if wn else 'N/A'}, G={[n['boundary'][0] for n in gn]}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
